description: Update README, app.py sidebar navigation, and SUPABASE_SETUP.md to reflect all new pages and features. Final integration and documentation pass.
steps: Update app.py sidebar navigation to list the new pages: Data Join & Merge, SQL Query Interface, Data Dictionary
Update README.md features table to include pages 13 (Data Join), 14 (SQL Query), 15 (Data Dictionary) and mention column transformations, templates, annotations
Update README.md project structure section to include new files (utils/data_join.py, utils/sql_engine.py, utils/column_transforms.py, utils/templates.py, utils/annotations.py, pages/13-15)
Ensure SUPABASE_SETUP.md 'What gets stored' table includes dp_templates
Update init_all_session_state() in utils/data_loader.py to include new session state keys: merged_df, sql_result_df, dp_annotations, dp_data_dictionary, dp_templates_cache
acceptance_criteria: app.py compiles cleanly with new sidebar entries
README.md lists all new pages and features
utils/data_loader.py includes new session state defaults
